failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id AS profile_id, 
  p.username, 
  p.full_name, 
  ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, q) AS relevance
FROM profile p, 
     to_tsquery('english', 'Italian & (restaurant | comida | cucina) & (Rio | "Rio de Janeiro")') AS q
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ q
ORDER BY relevance DESC
LIMIT 10;
